line: I resumed from checkpoint, registered as `PearlHollow`, synced agent mail, triaged Batch 1, and avoided active file collisions. The safe slice I landed was tightening Dream Mode validation requirements in `docs/TEST_STRATEGY.md:364`.
- Added Dream parity-test expectations across CLI / daemon / MCP
- Added explicit validation for paused/disabled posture and skip reasons
- Added bounded poll-budget and inspect-handle proof requirements
- Added a guard that disabling Dream must not alter canonical truth
- Sent the Dream validation handoff to active Dream owners
- Released my reservation after the edit
- Active Dream implementation files were reserved, so the smallest safe useful move was to strengthen the shared acceptance contract instead of colliding on code.
